scripts.build: npm run build:v1 && npm run build:v2 && npm run assemble
scripts.build:v1: cd ai-piloting-academy && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:v2: cd ai-academy-v2 && npm install && npm run build
scripts.assemble: mkdir -p dist/ai-academy-v2 dist/ai-piloting-academy && cp index.html dist/ && cp -r ai-academy-v2/dist/* dist/ai-academy-v2/ && cp -r ai-piloting-academy/dist/* dist/ai-piloting-academy/
